perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a blue fuzzy hat and a black coat is sitting at an outdoor table at night, speaking enthusiastically to the camera. (2) The scene cuts between close-up shots of various desserts: a tall glass of strawberry milk frost topped with large strawberries and condensed milk, a bowl of red bean milk frost, and a plate containing colorful taro ice cubes. (3) The woman is shown tasting the strawberry ice and the red bean ice, expressing delight through wide eyes and smiles. (4) Another woman appears in a close-up, also discussing the strawberry dessert. (5) The camera pans to a man wearing a beige hoodie sitting at the same table, eating taro ice, before returning to the main character laughing and showing the food again.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts playing as a female voice enthusiastically introduces the famous 60-year-old Tai Yang Pan traditional ice shop in Tainan. (2) The female voice provides a detailed commentary on the 'Strawberry Milk Frost' and 'Red Bean Milk Frost,' using an excited and cheerful tone. (3) Sound effects like 'pop' and 'ting' are used to accentuate text overlays. (4) The audio shifts to a field recording of a conversation between the main female speaker, her sister (on-screen), and a male friend named Bill (off-screen/partially on-screen) about the sweetness of the ice and the experience of eating it in the cold wind. (5) Low ambient street noise and wind are audible in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Local people all eat this' (Hook text/Emotional). (2) 'Tainan 60 years Tai Yang Pan Traditional Ice' (Functional/Title). (3) 'Strawberry Milk Frost', 'Large strawberries', 'Super fragrant' (Functional descriptions). (4) 'Signature Red Bean Milk Frost' (Functional description). (5) 'Any 5 for 60 yuan, 15 yuan each' (Functional price info). (6) 'Wow, full of condensed milk' (Decorative/Emotional). (7) 'Sister ordered this', 'A bit sweet' (Functional narrative). (8) 'Bill eating ice in the cold wind' (Decorative/Humorous).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Presentation of specific dishes -> Tasting reactions -> Group dialogue and summary.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female companion (sister), 1 male companion (Bill).
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a distinctive blue fuzzy hood/hat and a thick black textured coat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor seating area of a traditional dessert shop at night; background features parked scooters, street signs, and pink plastic stools.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural street lighting mixed with artificial indoor lighting from the shop.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Intro -> Item Showcase -> Review -> Interaction.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To recommend a local traditional dessert shop (Tai Yang Pan) in Tainan by showcasing its signature products and demonstrating a positive, fun social experience eating there.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct naming of the shop and detailed positive review of multiple menu items.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Main creator wears a signature blue fuzzy hat; usage of 'Bill' as a recurring character.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video blends personal vlog elements with professional food review pacing, making the recommendation feel both authentic and persuasive.
